subcategories.name: Business Analysis Methodologies & Documentation
subcategories.description: Strong understanding and experience in Business Analysis methodologies, requirement gathering techniques, and preparing functional documentation such as BRDs, FRDs, user stories, use cases, process flows, and functional specifications.

subcategories.name: Healthcare & Enterprise IT Systems Knowledge
subcategories.description: Direct experience working on Hospital Information Management System (HIMS), Radiology Information System (RIS), Picture Archiving and Communication System (PACS), Student Management System (SMS), ERP solutions, or other Healthcare IT applications.

subcategories.name: SDLC & Agile/Scrum Understanding
subcategories.description: Good understanding of Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC), Agile/Scrum methodologies, and implementation lifecycle processes.

subcategories.name: Data Analysis & Reporting Tools
subcategories.description: Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, reporting, and presentation tools to analyze operational and business data, generate reports, dashboards, and actionable insights.

subcategories.name: Requirement Categorization & Solution Design
subcategories.description: Ability to distinguish between requirements that necessitate new product development versus those addressable through existing product configuration or workflow changes.

subcategories.name: Relevant Business Analysis Experience
subcategories.description: 2–6 years of relevant experience in Business Analysis, Functional Consulting, Product Coordination, or Healthcare IT projects.

subcategories.name: Project Delivery & Implementation
subcategories.description: Demonstrated experience in ensuring successful and timely project delivery, supporting implementation and enhancement of business applications, and tracking project progress, milestones, and risks.

subcategories.name: Client & Stakeholder Engagement
subcategories.description: Experience collaborating with business stakeholders, clients, and internal teams, conducting client demos, user training, and stakeholder discussions, and gathering requirements directly from end-users.

subcategories.name: Career Progression & Trajectory
subcategories.description: Evaluates the candidate's career velocity, growth, and increasing scope of responsibility, indicating drive and potential for impact in project delivery and stakeholder management.

subcategories.name: Healthcare Workflow & Operations Understanding
subcategories.description: Understanding of healthcare workflows, hospital operations, and general enterprise business processes.

subcategories.name: Government Stakeholder Experience
subcategories.description: Prior experience working with Government stakeholders at their premises.

subcategories.name: Analytical & Problem-Solving Skills
subcategories.description: Strong analytical thinking, problem-solving, and critical thinking abilities to understand business workflows and translate them into functional solutions.

subcategories.name: Communication & Presentation Skills
subcategories.description: Strong communication, presentation, and client interaction skills for effective collaboration, training, and stakeholder discussions.

subcategories.name: Stakeholder Management & Cross-functional Coordination
subcategories.description: Ability to manage multiple stakeholders, coordinate effectively across cross-functional teams (product, implementation, QA, technical), and work in dynamic project environments.

subcategories.name: Client-Site Work & Adaptability
subcategories.description: Willingness and ability to be stationed at client locations during critical implementation phases to work closely with end-users and adapt to dynamic project environments.

subcategories.name: Bachelor's Degree
subcategories.description: Bachelor's degree in business administration, Computer Science, IT, Engineering, Healthcare Management, or a related field.
